MainContent.experienceMobileTitle: Internship in Software Engineering at Amazonas State Court of Accounts
MainContent.experienceMobileParagraph: Developed end-to-end applications, participated in the annual LGPD assessment, automated processes, and applied agile methodologies for sectoral organization.
MainContent.experienceMobileParagraph2: Developed overlays for stream metrics, API for continuous feedback to clients. Created Bolota chatbot, automating with Gemini model.
MainContent.educationMobileTitle: Bachelor in Software Engineering at Federal Institute of Amazonas
MainContent.educationMobileParagraph: Bachelor in Software Engineering at Federal Institute of Amazonas, with a solid academic foundation, major GPA of 9 relevant disciplines: AED, Object-Oriented Programming, Architecture, WEB, Mobile, Quality Assurance.
MainContent.papeParagraph: I was selected for the success student in recognition of high academic performance, making me a remunerated scholar. I maintained high performance while completing projects and advanced technical training.
